endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Billing/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available billing REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices
endpoints.description: Lists the available invoices for a subscription in reverse chronological order beginning with the most recent invoice. In preview, invoices are available via this API only for invoice periods which end December 1, 2016 or later
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices/latest
endpoints.description: Gets the most recent invoice. When getting a single invoice, the downloadUrl property is expanded automatically.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices/{invoiceName}
endpoints.description: Gets a named invoice resource. When getting a single invoice, the downloadUrl property is expanded automatically.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{INVOICENAME}} with a real invoicename.
